verdict_reason: The verse is a serious moment in the chapter — Arjuna at the bottom of his honest reasoning, reporting genuine epistemic exhaustion. The engineering layer treats this gravity by (a) explicitly distinguishing it from 'I don't know' as a stalling tactic, (b) explicitly distinguishing it from 50/50 indecision (counter-example), and (c) preserving the structural role: 'this is not the same as genuine equipoise. Genuine equipoise picks a path.' A serious practitioner would feel the verse has been honored — the engineering layer takes the symmetric-dread diagnostic seriously and treats it as a real cognitive state, not a slogan. The quotable line 'when both directions feel equally heavy, the frame is the bug, not your conviction' is sharp without being flippant. PASS.
